focus: CopilotKit Communications Coach — Phase 6 complete (Sprints 6c + 6d delivered)

system_context.what_shareplan_is: A subscription sharing intermediary. Sells YouTube Premium (6mo/12mo) and Coursera Plus to Korean customers acquired via ppomppu.co.kr forum. Payments via bank transfer. Operator manages conversations manually via Kakao Business Channel.
system_context.what_this_project_is: A completely separate subsystem from the publisher/scheduler. Goal: capture all channel conversations, annotate them, populate a Kakao Knowledge Base, and automate replies using OpenAI. The publisher must never be touched by Kakao/CopilotKit code.
system_context.current_state: Phase 6 complete. CopilotKit sidebar is fully wired: 3 readable context hooks, 4 coach actions with copy-to-clipboard render, PII scrubbing, and coach event logging to PostgreSQL.

completed_this_session.detail: draftReply(tone), refineMessage(draft, style), suggestFollowUp(), translateToKorean(text, register). Each renders a SuggestionCard with loading state and Copy button. LLM generates suggestion as a parameter value.

completed_this_session.item: Sprint 6d — PII scrubber extracted to standalone module
completed_this_session.detail: lib/piiScrubber.ts created as a dependency-free module. Fixed a real bug: phone regex now runs before bank account regex in PASS_1 to prevent 010-XXXX-XXXX being misclassified as [ACCOUNT]. lib/copilotCoach.ts re-exports scrubContext from piiScrubber.

completed_this_session.item: Sprint 6d — PII unit tests (11 tests, all passing)
completed_this_session.detail: tests/unit/copilotCoach.pii.test.ts covers: bank account regex, IBK keyword trigger, phone (dash + no-dash), email, RRN, space-separated account, dot-separated phone, clean text, multi-PII. Added to test:unit script.

server.ts: pii_scrub events logged fire-and-forget in /api/kakao/thread/:userKey when scrubbing changes any utterance. New POST /api/kakao/coach-event endpoint for client-side events. CoachSidebar.tsx: applied event posted when operator clicks Copy on any suggestion.

Ran npm run mempalace:handover for handover-20260418-2200.json to sync stale state.index.json. Mempalace palace has 387 drawers. Session lifecycle: wake-up → checkpoint after tasks → handover at session end.

coach_event_logging.server_events: pii_scrub (logged per thread load when scrubs occur)
coach_event_logging.client_events: applied (logged when Copy clicked, via POST /api/kakao/coach-event)

pii_scrubber.pass_1_order: phone → bank_account → email → rrn (order matters — phone before bank)
pii_scrubber.pass_2: keyword-triggered for unformatted bank account and phone numbers

validation.integration_tests: not run this session (no changes to integration test scope)

No spec written yet; wait until WhatsApp credentials are available before speccing

pending_next.task: Add dismissed and edited event types to POST /api/kakao/coach-event
notes: Currently only applied is logged client-side
dismissed would require detecting when the CopilotSidebar closes without Copy being clicked
Low priority — applied events are sufficient for initial quality review

session_boundary_recommendation.recommended_cut: Phase 6 fully closed. Clean cut before Phase 7 (WhatsApp API) which depends on external credential availability.
reason: All 4 sprints of Phase 6 are done and tested.
Phase 7 has no spec and depends on user acquiring WhatsApp Business API — no work can start yet.
MemPalace handover will capture this state cleanly for any future session.
